17 = Site is accredited to provide DME limited to off-the-shelf non-custom products and 
pharmaceuticals 
18 = Site is accredited to provide a full range of DME including custom items and pharmaceuticals 
Null/missing = This information has not been reported by the pharmacy. 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2012. This information is optional, and not required to be reported by 
pharmacies to NCPDP.
